chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-5237 / 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of Petition dated 17.07.2018. 12.02.2026. None present for Petitioner. M/s. Ghulam Akbar Lashari & Gul Afshan, Advocates for Respondent (SBCA). ___________________ None present on behalf of the Petitioner. This Petition pertains to the year 2018. Question of maintainability was also framed vide order dated 17.07.2018. Since then no serious effort was made to either satisfy the Court on maintainability or to proceed the matter. Today also no one appears on behalf of the Petitioner. The matter was also fixed on 04.09.2018. Petition is dismissed for non prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
